mapper.sql: rfi.re_id as rri_id, rfi.name, rfi.relationship, rfi.company, rfi.post, rfi.tele, rfi.gender, rfi.birthday, rfi.mobile_phone, rfi.attribute1, rfi.attribute2, rfi.attribute3, rfi.enabled_flag, rfi.id, rfi.update_by, rfi.create_time, rfi.create_by, rfi.update_time

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.mobile_phone as ${tAlias}_mobile_phone, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into re_family_interface (re_id, name, relationship, company, post, tele, gender, birthday, mobile_phone, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_by, create_time, create_by, update_time) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update re_family_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
